tasks.subject: Task 1: Relationship, basic-user & profile schemas
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend apiSchemas.ts with relationship/basic-user building blocks, recompose UserSearchResultSchema (add username + relationship), add UserProfileResponseSchema, and keep userSearch test green.

**Files:** modify nebbler/src/database/schemas/apiSchemas.ts, nebbler/src/database/schemas/index.ts, nebbler/src/utils/__tests__/userSearch.test.ts; create nebbler/src/database/schemas/__tests__/apiSchemas.test.ts

**Verify:** cd nebbler && npx jest src/database/schemas/__tests__/apiSchemas.test.ts src/utils/__tests__/userSearch.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nebbler/src/database/schemas/apiSchemas.ts", "nebbler/src/database/schemas/index.ts", "nebbler/src/utils/__tests__/userSearch.test.ts", "nebbler/src/database/schemas/__tests__/apiSchemas.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd nebbler && npx jest src/database/schemas/__tests__/apiSchemas.test.ts src/utils/__tests__/userSearch.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RelationshipStateSchema enumerates the 4 contract states", "RelationshipSchema has state/request_id/connection_id", "UserSearchResultSchema requires username + relationship", "UserProfileResponseSchema exists; BasicUserSchema exported", "index.ts re-exports all new schemas+types", "userSearch.test.ts green; schemas coverage >=90%"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Connection-request list/item schemas
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Zod schemas for GET /api/connection-requests (incoming/outgoing) and the POST created-request body, reusing BasicUserSchema.

**Files:** create nebbler/src/database/schemas/connectionRequestSchemas.ts + __tests__; modify index.ts

**Verify:** cd nebbler && npx jest src/database/schemas/__tests__/connectionRequestSchemas.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nebbler/src/database/schemas/connectionRequestSchemas.ts", "nebbler/src/database/schemas/index.ts", "nebbler/src/database/schemas/__tests__/connectionRequestSchemas.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd nebbler && npx jest src/database/schemas/__tests__/connectionRequestSchemas.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ConnectionRequestItemSchema = {id,user:BasicUser,requested_at}", "ConnectionRequestListResponseSchema = {incoming[],outgoing[]}", "ConnectionRequestSchema tolerant {id,requested_at}", "re-exported from index.ts; schemas coverage >=90%"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Relationship helper (relationship.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** UI-agnostic relationshipToAction + otherParticipant helpers.

**Files:** create nebbler/src/utils/relationship.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** cd nebbler && npx jest src/utils/__tests__/relationship.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nebbler/src/utils/relationship.ts", "nebbler/src/utils/__tests__/relationship.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd nebbler && npx jest src/utils/__tests__/relationship.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RelationshipAction union connect/cancel/respond/open", "relationshipToAction maps all 4 states + throws on inconsistent payload", "otherParticipant resolves both directions", "no fetch/React imports; utils coverage thresholds met"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: src/api/connections.ts — REST client (typed errors + 5 calls) + api→data boundary
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Online REST client in src/api/connections.ts (sanctioned fetch layer, NO exemption): typed errors + auth/fetch/error-mapping core + sendRequest/listRequests/resolveRequest/removeConnection/getUserProfile. Add api→data boundary edge.

**Files:** create nebbler/src/api/connections.ts + src/api/__tests__/connections.test.ts; modify nebbler/eslint.config.js (api allow-list += 'data')

**Verify:** cd nebbler && npx jest src/api/__tests__/connections.test.ts && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nebbler/src/api/connections.ts", "nebbler/eslint.config.js", "nebbler/src/api/__tests__/connections.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd nebbler && npx jest src/api/__tests__/connections.test.ts && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Typed errors incl distinct InboundRequestExistsError", "all 5 calls send/list/resolve/remove/profile", "Zod-validated; bearer token; missing token throws before fetch", "src/api/** with NO no-restricted-syntax exemption", "eslint api allow-list gains data edge", "jest+lint+tsc pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: TanStack Query hooks (useConnectionsApi) + full gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose src/api/connections.ts fns as TanStack Query hooks (connectionsKeys + query/mutation hooks w/ cache invalidation), then run npm run check.

**Files:** create nebbler/src/hooks/useConnectionsApi.ts + src/hooks/__tests__/useConnectionsApi.test.tsx; modify nebbler/src/hooks/index.ts (only if it re-exports hooks)

**Verify:** cd nebbler && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nebbler/src/hooks/useConnectionsApi.ts", "nebbler/src/hooks/__tests__/useConnectionsApi.test.tsx", "nebbler/src/hooks/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd nebbler && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["connectionsKeys factory", "useConnectionRequests + useUserProfile queries (enabled gate)", "useSendRequest/useResolveRequest/useRemoveConnection mutations invalidate caches", "hook tests via renderHook + QueryClientProvider wrapper mocking @api/connections", "npm run check passes"]}
```
